usageBreakdown.title: Channel Consumption Breakdown

insights.title: Smart Insights & Renewal Prediction
insights.description: Predict remaining availability based on latest token usage and provide renewal or optimization suggestions.
insights.trendHelper: Average daily usage over the last {{days}} days ({{unit}})

healthLabel.success: Balance is healthy — you can continue current strategies.
healthLabel.warn: Balance is approaching the warning range. Watch high-usage tasks.
healthLabel.error: Balance is critical. Recharge or reduce high-usage tasks immediately.
healthLabel.info: Not enough usage data yet — keep observing for now.

success.item1: Average daily usage around {{average}} tokens — current strategy looks fine.
success.item2: Review ad sync tasks periodically to keep strategy and consumption aligned.

warn.item1: Balance covers roughly {{days}} days. Investigate recent high-usage tasks.
warn.item2: Queued tasks may consume {{pending}} tokens — consider staggering execution.

error.item1: Balance only lasts {{days}} days. Adjust tasks or top up now.
error.item2: Pause non-critical evaluation tasks and prioritize ad sync or delivery work.

info.item1: Insufficient usage data — observe a bit longer.
info.item2: After recharging, track new tasks to confirm actual consumption.
